We are good enough, and we deserve to integrate this experience into divine love.

Working through that trauma from when I felt that low has been an interesting experience. Sometimes I feel stuck too. The healthiest thing for me personally was to not isolate myself, allow myself to ask for help and be seen by the right people who could truly nurture me.
